CustomField.label: Variance Threshold
CustomField.description: Reporting-mode variance threshold percent for this budget. In the Universal Budget grid's reporting mode, line items whose actual-vs-budgeted variance reaches this percent of the budgeted value get an advisory flag. Blank or 0 uses the default of 10 percent.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Variance threshold percent for reporting (e.g. 10). Line items reaching this variance get an advisory flag. Leave blank for the default 10 percent.
